name: 策天十八飛星
source: 明代《十八飛星策天紫微斗數全集》

stars.meaning: 主宰紫微垣，帝王之星，掌權貴命運，為策天飛星之首
stars.meaning_en: Emperor Star, ruler of the Purple Forbidden Enclosure, governing authority and destiny
stars.flight_rule: 飛入對宮（偏移6），主權貴變動
stars.omen_good: 遇祿權科，帝座穩固，權傾天下
stars.omen_bad: 遇忌星或空虛，帝座不穩，權位動搖

stars.meaning: 主虛幻不實，多空想少行動，性格飄忽不定
stars.meaning_en: Star of Void, represents illusion, inaction, and instability
stars.flight_rule: 飛入偏移4宮，主虛驚空想
stars.omen_good: 逢吉星化解，反主清高脫俗
stars.omen_bad: 遇煞忌，虛耗錢財，事多不成

stars.meaning: 主貴人提攜，得長輩庇蔭，社會地位崇高
stars.meaning_en: Star of Nobility, represents patronage, social status, and honor
stars.flight_rule: 飛入偏移8宮，主貴人助力
stars.omen_good: 逢祿權，貴人常伴，仕途順暢
stars.omen_bad: 遇忌煞，貴人遠離，孤立無援

stars.meaning: 主文書印信，掌官方憑證，代表權威認可
stars.meaning_en: Star of the Seal, represents official documents, credentials, and authority
stars.flight_rule: 飛入偏移3宮，主文書印信
stars.omen_good: 逢科星，文書順利，考試高中
stars.omen_bad: 遇忌星，文書失誤，合約糾紛

stars.meaning: 主壽元長短，福澤深厚，性格穩重持久
stars.meaning_en: Star of Longevity, represents lifespan, blessings, and endurance
stars.flight_rule: 飛入偏移9宮，主壽元福澤
stars.omen_good: 逢吉星，壽比南山，福澤綿長
stars.omen_bad: 遇煞忌，健康受損，宜養生保健

stars.meaning: 主落空虛耗，事物消散無蹤，但亦主宗教靈性
stars.meaning_en: Star of the Sky, represents emptiness and dissipation, but also spirituality
stars.flight_rule: 飛入偏移7宮，主落空虛耗
stars.omen_good: 適修行人，超脫世俗，靈性開悟
stars.omen_bad: 凡事落空，財帛虛耗，計劃成泡影

stars.meaning: 主婚姻喜慶，桃花人緣，感情姻緣之主星
stars.meaning_en: Red Phoenix, star of marriage, celebration, and romantic relationships
stars.flight_rule: 飛入偏移2宮，主婚姻喜慶
stars.omen_good: 逢吉，佳偶天成，婚姻美滿
stars.omen_bad: 逢煞忌，感情波折，婚姻不順

stars.meaning: 主財庫聚散，錢財儲蓄，掌管財富的保管與流通
stars.meaning_en: Star of the Storehouse, governs wealth storage and financial flow
stars.flight_rule: 飛入偏移10宮，主財庫聚散
stars.omen_good: 逢祿星，財庫充盈，積蓄豐厚
stars.omen_bad: 逢忌星，財庫空虛，入不敷出

stars.meaning: 主官運仕途，事業發展，掌管功名利祿
stars.meaning_en: Star of the Official, governs career advancement and official rank
stars.flight_rule: 飛入偏移5宮，主官運仕途
stars.omen_good: 逢權星，官運亨通，升職加薪
stars.omen_bad: 逢忌煞，官場是非，職場困境

stars.meaning: 主文學才華，學業考試，掌管文教智慧
stars.meaning_en: Star of Literary Prosperity, governs education, exams, and intellectual pursuits
stars.flight_rule: 飛入偏移1宮，主文學才華
stars.omen_good: 逢科星，金榜題名，文采斐然
stars.omen_bad: 逢忌星，考試失利，文書出錯

stars.meaning: 主福德享受，一生安樂，精神富足
stars.meaning_en: Star of Blessing, represents spiritual contentment and life enjoyment
stars.flight_rule: 飛入偏移11宮，主福德享受
stars.omen_good: 逢吉，福壽雙全，一生安樂
stars.omen_bad: 逢煞忌，福薄命苦，多憂少樂

stars.meaning: 主祿位俸給，財源穩定，代表穩定的收入與地位
stars.meaning_en: Star of Prosperity, represents stable income, salary, and social position
stars.flight_rule: 飛入偏移8宮，主祿位進退
stars.omen_good: 逢祿，祿位高升，財源廣進
stars.omen_bad: 逢忌，祿位不保，收入減少

stars.meaning: 主權杖威嚴，掌管紀律秩序，代表權威與管教
stars.meaning_en: Star of the Staff, represents authority, discipline, and order
stars.flight_rule: 飛入偏移3宮，主權杖威嚴
stars.omen_good: 逢吉，執掌權柄，令行禁止
stars.omen_bad: 逢煞，以權壓人，招致反彈

stars.meaning: 主異變奇遇，人生多變化，遇事出人意料
stars.meaning_en: Star of Anomaly, represents unexpected changes and unusual encounters
stars.flight_rule: 飛入偏移6宮，主異變奇遇
stars.omen_good: 逢吉，奇遇連連，因禍得福
stars.omen_bad: 逢煞忌，突發變故，措手不及

stars.meaning: 主旗鼓先鋒，行動力強，勇於開拓進取
stars.meaning_en: Star of the Banner, represents pioneering spirit, courage, and initiative
stars.flight_rule: 飛入偏移9宮，主旗鼓先鋒
stars.omen_good: 逢吉，勇猛精進，戰無不勝
stars.omen_bad: 逢煞，衝動魯莽，有勇無謀

stars.meaning: 主刀兵刑傷，代表銳利果斷，但有受傷之虞
stars.meaning_en: Star of the Blade, represents sharpness and decisiveness, but risk of injury
stars.flight_rule: 飛入偏移7宮，主刀兵刑傷
stars.omen_good: 逢吉，果斷英明，外科醫術精湛
stars.omen_bad: 逢煞忌，刀傷血光，手術意外

stars.meaning: 主刑罰訴訟，代表法律紀律，亦主正義執法
stars.meaning_en: Star of Punishment, represents legal matters, litigation, and justice
stars.flight_rule: 飛入偏移4宮，主刑罰訴訟
stars.omen_good: 逢吉，執法嚴明，法律專業精通
stars.omen_bad: 逢煞忌，官非纏身，牢獄之災

stars.meaning: 主桃花風流，人緣魅力，感情豐富但易招桃花劫
stars.meaning_en: Star of Peach Blossom, represents charm and romance, but risk of romantic troubles
stars.flight_rule: 飛入偏移2宮，主桃花風流
stars.omen_good: 逢吉，異性緣佳，魅力超群
stars.omen_bad: 逢煞忌，爛桃花多，感情糾紛

stars.meaning: 主哭泣喪服，代表悲傷離別，但亦主慈悲心腸
stars.meaning_en: Star of Crying, represents grief and separation, but also compassion
stars.flight_rule: 飛入偏移10宮，主哭泣喪服
stars.omen_good: 逢吉，慈悲為懷，感動他人
stars.omen_bad: 逢煞忌，喪親之痛，悲傷難遣
